_comment: Pinned version + sha256 for each locked spec schema vendored from the wiki vault (ruth-pilot-b-wiki/_spec). `tripod check-drift` fails the build if a vendored file's hash no longer matches its pin, or (with --vault) if the wiki's canonical copy has drifted. Update only via a governed SPEC_CHANGES.md entry. See decision A + SPEC_CHANGES.md.
_sources_comment: Frozen BHSA extracts + the derived entity alias table (docs/SOURCE_AND_SCALING.md, docs/COVERAGE.md). Generated OFFLINE by extractor/*.py from local BHSA tf/2021 + the wiki BCD; pinned by sha256 so coverage reconciliation is reproducible (same Hebrew source ⇒ same R set). Regenerate only via the recorded extractor/build commands, then re-pin.
